g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the shop owner toggle stock?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis pub/sub fire the inventory event?')
sendPrompt('How is Typesense updated when stock changes?')
sendPrompt('How fast does a customer see the stock change?')
sendPrompt('How often does the delivery app send GPS?')
sendPrompt('How is the GPS location stored in Redis?')
sendPrompt('How does Ola Maps calculate ETA from GPS data?')
sendPrompt('How does Socket.IO push location to the customer?')
sendPrompt('What does the customer see on live tracking?')
